name: Ltr Pharma Limited
analysis: LTP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.5900, stop A$0.4158, target A$1.1126 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
